title: Assistant Store Manager - Amazon Books India Holdings Services - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Amazon Books India Holdings Services - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Amazon Books India Holdings Services in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Amazon Books India Holdings Services:
Amazon Books India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India Holdings Services!
